rulings.Case Title: CALIFORNIA CORRECTIONAL PEACE OFFICERS' et al VS. STATE OF CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Section 128.7
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY JULY 25, 2006 LINE 10. PLAINTIFF LEONARD MCLEOD, SANDI CAMPBELL, KEVIN RAYMOND, CALIFORNIA CORRECTIONAL PEACE OFFICERS', MICHAEL JAMINEZ, ROBERT DEAN, JAMES MARTIN, LANCE CORCORAN, STEPHEN WALKER'S Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Section 128.7 IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S ARGUMENTS WERE NOT CLEARLY FRIVILOUS; A.) DEFENDANT WAS ATTEMPTING TO EXTEND LAW PER COLLINS; B.) RE 1983 PLAINTIFF CAN SUE OFFICIAL INJUNCTION BUT NOT RECOVER DAMAGES; C.) QUALIFIED IMMUNITY NOT FRIVILOUS. =(302/REQ/PB)
